title: Watercolor Birthday Card
summary: Soft watercolor birthday card with pastel wildflowers and brush-calligraphy lettering.
prompt: A soft watercolor birthday card design. Loose, hand-painted style with pastel pinks, sunny yellows, and mint greens. A small bouquet of wildflowers on the left, hand-lettered "Happy Birthday" in elegant brush calligraphy across the top center, gentle paper texture, plenty of white space. Square 1:1 composition, suitable for printing or sharing.
